nodes.label: Tests for mangaba_cli.model_catalog — remote manifest fetch + cache + fallback.
Isolate MANGABA_HOME + reset any module-level catalog cache per test.
Exercise the fallback paths via the real callers in mangaba_cli.models.
The /model picker must surface the manifest's nous list, not the         in-repo
Fail if the on-disk manifest is out of date relative to in-repo lists.
Drop fields that always change (timestamps) for diff comparison.
``scripts/build_model_catalog.py`` output must match the committed file.
